category_sources: source_facts.description says doublecpp provides double dispatch in C++; official homepage describes it as a C++ preprocessor for multi-method double dispatch.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is Doublecpp - double dispatch in C++; source_facts.name is doublecpp.
docs_sources: Official homepage links the downloadable doublecpp.pdf documentation and includes installation/build instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage documents anonymous CVS access but does not provide a stable HTTP source-control repository URL, so repo is left null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe double dispatch support for C++ through a preprocessor.
